common.legalFullEnglish: Duk rubutaccen dokokin kasa ne da Turanci a ƙasa.

home.confirmInWallet: Tabbatar da fara wasa a walat...
home.playCostNote: $0.01 USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo per paid game. Keep a little CELO for network fees (gas).
home.top100Prize: Wasannin 100 mafi girma sun raba kyaututtuka
home.telegramCta: Shiga al'umma, samu sabbin labarai & bayanai game da kyaututtuka

landing.tagline: Yi ciniki na crypto kuma samu kyaututtuka
landing.walletCostNotice: Each paid game is $0.01 in USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo. Keep a small CELO balance for gas. Wallets may use CELO if stable gas fails.
landing.walletExtensionNote: Don’t see Phantom or “Other browser wallet”? Install Phantom (enable Ethereum) or refresh after installing a wallet.
landing.connectSubtitle: Zaɓi walat: ƙaddamar da farko, sannan QR Valora idan an kunna.
landing.connectValoraQrSub: WalletConnect — scan with Valora or another mobile wallet
landing.connectUserRejected: You cancelled the wallet prompt. Try again when ready.
landing.walletHint: Phantom: enable Ethereum in the extension. Valora QR: set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID (free from cloud.reown.com). Gray button: wallets that use window.ethereum.
landing.connectError: Ba za a iya haɗawa ba. Sake gwadawa.
landing.termsAgree: Ta hanyar haɗawa, kun yarda da sharuɗɗanmu

leaderboard.fetchError: Ba za a iya loda jagorar ba
leaderboard.title: Jagorar maki
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentDesc: Gasar wata ta fara 1 ga Afrilu kuma ta ƙare 1 ga Mayu
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentSub: Wasannin mafi girma suna samun kuɗi na gaske
leaderboard.top100Extra: 🎁 Wasannin 100 mafi girma sun raba kyaututtuka

profile.supportSubtitle: Yi magana game da matsala ko nemi taimako a Telegram
profile.noTradesHint: Fara wasa don gina tarihin ku!

airdrop.title: Kyaututtuka
airdrop.holdTitle: Ajiye TPOINT don caji da ayyuka masu mahimmanci!
airdrop.holdIntro: Ajiye TPOINT ɗinku don buɗe caji da ayyuka masu mahimmanci!
airdrop.periodicalPrizesDesc: Kasance a cikin wasannin mafi girma a Jagorar kuma samu kyaututtuka zuwa MiniPay.
airdrop.maximizeScoreDesc: Samu mafi girman maki a kowane wasa. Ci gaba!
airdrop.leaveProfitDesc: Kuna iya fita da riba — sama da 🪙10,000+! Yawanci suna samun.
airdrop.leaderboardBanner: 🏆 Wasannin mafi girma a Jagorar suna samun kyaututtuka zuwa MiniPay. Ci gaba!
airdrop.airdropBlurb: Ku kasance a hankali! Al'ummar Airdrop ɗinmu za ta raba masu amfani da takardu masu mahimmanci.

tradearea.gameBusyDesc: Sabar yana da mutane da yawa. Sake gwadawa daga baya.
tradearea.fundsReturned: 💰 Kuɗin ku da ma'amalar ku za su dawo.
tradearea.activePositionDesc: Dole ne ku rufe matsayinku kafin fita.
tradearea.liquidatedDesc: Dokin ku ya kai 🪙0. Wani lokaci zai yi kyau!
tradearea.statusGameEnded: Wasa ya ƙare! Ana sake loda...
tradearea.statusTxRejected: Ma'amala ta ƙi — zaku iya fita
tradearea.statusInsufficientGas: CELO bai isa don gas ba

about.mainP1: Tradcast wasa ne na ciniki wanda ke amfani da bayanai na gaske. Duk bayanai na gaske ne.
about.mainP2: Koyi ba tare da haɗarin kuɗi ba. Koyi karanta jadawali da sarrafa matsayi.
about.longExpl: LONG: buɗe ko ƙara 🪙100. Riba idan farashin ya hau.
about.shortExpl: SHORT: buɗe ko ƙara 🪙100. Riba idan farashin ya sauka.
about.closeExpl: RUFE: rufe matsayinku kuma samu riba ko asara.
about.rule1: Ba za ku iya samun LONG da SHORT a lokaci ɗaya ba
about.rule2: Babu hedging a cikin wannan wasan
about.rule3: Don canza lokaci, rufe matsayi farko
about.rule4: Duk matsayi suna amfani da leverage 20×
about.flow2: Buɗe matsayi da LONG ko SHORT
about.flow3: Rufe lokacin da kuke son samun riba
